name: payment_options
text: I can pay 100 on 2026-07-25. What options do I have?

name: failed_payment
text: My payment failed after I changed my card.

name: hardship
text: I cannot pay. I need more time because of financial pressure.

name: distress
text: I cannot sleep and I feel humiliated. I need support.

name: side_channel
text: Send the payment account to my WeChat.

name: fraud
text: This is not my loan. I think this is a scam.

name: transcript_pressure_and_distress
text: The pressure is too high. I cannot sleep and I need time to deal with this.

name: transcript_changed_card_failure
text: The deduction failed three times after I changed my card this morning.

name: transcript_wechat_account_instruction
text: Please add my company WeChat and send the public account number there.

name: transcript_wrong_destination
text: I paid, but it may have gone to the wrong person instead of the platform.
